names.value: {0: 'Bacterial Spot', 1: 'Early_Blight', 2: 'Healthy', 3: 'Late_blight', 4: 'Leaf Mold', 5: 'Target_Spot', 6: 'black spot', 7: 'Apple Scab Leaf', 8: 'Apple leaf', 9: 'Apple rust leaf', 10: 'Bell_pepper leaf spot', 11: 'Bell_pepper leaf', 12: 'Blueberry leaf', 13: 'Cherry leaf', 14: 'Corn Gray leaf spot', 15: 'Corn leaf blight', 16: 'Corn rust leaf', 17: 'Peach leaf', 18: 'Potato leaf early blight', 19: 'Potato leaf late blight', 20: 'Potato leaf', 21: 'Raspberry leaf', 22: 'Soyabean leaf', 23: 'Soybean leaf', 24: 'Squash Powdery mildew leaf', 25: 'Strawberry leaf', 26: 'Tomato Septoria leaf spot', 27: 'Tomato leaf mosaic virus', 28: 'Tomato leaf yellow virus', 29: 'Tomato leaf', 30: 'Tomato two spotted spider mites leaf', 31: 'grape leaf black rot', 32: 'grape leaf'}
